name: ai-office-3
description: AI-Office 3.0 - 内置文档引擎重构工作副本
author: AI-Office Team

scripts.dev:web:wait: bash scripts/dev/wait-for-server.sh && bash scripts/dev/wait-for-materials.sh && npm run dev:web
scripts.dev:web:full: concurrently --restart-tries -1 --restart-after 3000 -n server,web -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web:wait"
scripts.dev:web:research: concurrently --restart-tries -1 --restart-after 3000 -n server,platform,calc,ai4science,web -c yellow,magenta,green,blue,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:materials:backend" "npm run dev:materials:calc" "npm run dev:ai4science:backend" "npm run dev:web:wait"
scripts.check:web: npm run typecheck && npm run build:web
scripts.check:all: npm run check:web && npm run build:electron && npm run check:server
scripts.smoke:formal-template-ui: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-formal-template-generate-ui-smoke.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/run-formal-template-generate-ui-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:writer-article-ui: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-writer-article-ui-smoke.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/run-writer-article-ui-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:writer-article-package: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-writer-article-ui-smoke.ts && AI_WRITER_UI_SMOKE_MODE=packaged xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/run-writer-article-ui-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:voice-entry: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-vosk-voice-entry-smoke.ts electron/main/services/voskModelService.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/build/run-vosk-voice-entry-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:voice-entry-package: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-vosk-voice-entry-smoke.ts electron/main/services/voskModelService.ts && AI_WRITER_UI_SMOKE_MODE=packaged xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/build/run-vosk-voice-entry-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:settings-sync: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-settings-sync-smoke.ts src/utils/aiToolSettings.ts && node .tmp-smoke/build/run-settings-sync-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:app-package: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-packaged-app-shell-smoke.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/run-packaged-app-shell-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:knowledge-package: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-packaged-knowledge-library-smoke.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/run-packaged-knowledge-library-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:knowledge-ui-e2e: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-packaged-knowledge-panel-e2e-smoke.ts electron/main/services/knowledgeService.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/build/run-packaged-knowledge-panel-e2e-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:composer-knowledge-e2e: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-composer-knowledge-e2e-smoke.ts electron/main/services/knowledgeService.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/build/run-composer-knowledge-e2e-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:document-preview-save-knowledge: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-document-preview-save-knowledge-smoke.ts electron/main/services/knowledgeService.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/build/run-document-preview-save-knowledge-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:continue-stream-mode: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-continue-stream-mode-smoke.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/run-continue-stream-mode-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:cross-tab-writeback: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-cross-tab-writeback-smoke.ts && node .tmp-smoke/build/run-cross-tab-writeback-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:selection-rewrite-routing: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-selection-rewrite-routing-smoke.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/run-selection-rewrite-routing-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.smoke:email-ui: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-email-generation-ui-smoke.ts electron/main/services/knowledgeService.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/build/run-email-generation-ui-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
scripts.verify:web:user-flows: npm run check:boundaries && npm run build:web && cd server && npm run build && cd .. && npx tsx scripts/smoke/run-web-parity-smoke.ts all && npm run e2e:web
scripts.smoke:intro-package: rm -rf .tmp-smoke && npx tsc --target ES2022 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --jsx react-jsx --rootDir .. --outDir .tmp-smoke build/run-packaged-introduction-remake-smoke.ts && xvfb-run -a ./node_modules/.bin/electron .tmp-smoke/ai_writer3.0/build/run-packaged-introduction-remake-smoke.js && rm -rf .tmp-smoke
